passages.title: Symbols <Tags> & Reader’s “Attention” plus </script> safety
passages.meta: Contains <, >, &, ', "double quotes", slash /, long dash —, IELTS ‘curly’ “quotes”, and literal </script> text

paras.label: A
paras.text: A reader may see symbols such as <angle brackets>, ampersands & slashes / in a source.

paras.label: B
paras.text: The phrase ‘careful reading’ — often written in “quotes” — should not break the page.

careful — Paragraph B contains ‘careful reading’ with IELTS-style quotes.
